testcase.name: test_multichip_decoder_perf[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/ttnn/cpp/ttnn/operations/experimental/paged_cache/device/update_cache/paged_update_cache_device_operation.cpp:297: input_tensor.dtype() == DataType::FLOAT32 || input_tensor.dtype() == DataType::BFLOAT16 info: Data type of input tensor for paged_update_cache must be FLOAT32 or BFLOAT16; decode update repacks into the cache dtype and should not receive low-precision packed input backtrace: --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/ttnn/ttnn/_ttnn.so(+0x3c4ef2) [0x7a20a65c4ef2] --- testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices)
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_decoder_perf(mesh_device): if os.environ.get("RUN_MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF") != "1": pytest.skip("set RUN_MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF=1 to run warmed multichip timing") config = _config() seq_len = int(os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF_SEQ", config.sliding_window)) repeats = int(os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_DECODER_PREFILL_REPEATS", "10")) trace_replays = int(os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_DECODER_TRACE_REPLAYS", "100")) reference_path = _perf_reference_path(seq_len) assert reference_path.exists(), "capture the isolated single-chip timing first" baseline = json.loads(reference_path.read_text()) multichip_config, qkv_candidate = _perf_multichip_config_from_env() optimization_config = _perf_optimization_config_from_env(multichip_config) decoder = _decoder( _real_state_dict(), config, mesh_device, max_cache_len=max(128, seq_len + 1), multichip_config=multichip_config, optimization_config=optimization_config, ) page_table = decoder.create_page_table() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(9191) prefill_hidden = torch.randn(1, seq_len, config.hidden_size, generator=generator).to(torch.bfloat16) decode_hidden = torch.randn(1, 1, config.hidden_size, generator=generator).to(torch.bfloat16) prefill_ms, key_cache, value_cache = _time_prefill( decoder, mesh_device, prefill_hidden, repeats=repeats, label=f"MULTICHIP_{multichip_config.expert_strategy.upper()}", page_table=page_table, ) > decode_ms = _time_traced_decode( decoder, mesh_device, decode_hidden, key_cache, value_cache, position=seq_len, trace_replays=trace_replays, label=f"MULTICHIP_{multichip_config.expert_strategy.upper()}", page_table=page_table, )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1358: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1260: in _time_traced_decode decoder.decode_forward(tt_hidden, **kwargs) models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/tp2_multichip_decoder.py:976: in decode_forward hidden_states = self._decode_attention( models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/tp2_multichip_decoder.py:677: in _decode_attention ttnn.experimental.paged_update_cache( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.experimental.paged_update_cache', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.expe...uts=None, golden_function=None, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=None, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 6.2500e-02, -5.0000e-01, ..., 1.9062e+00, 8.4375e-01], ...2969, 0.9219, ..., -1.0312, 1.9688]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 2, 64]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE)) function_kwargs = {'page_table': device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[ 0, 1, 2]], shape=Shape([1, 3]), dtype=Da..._id: 0, MeshCoordinate([0, 3]) ttnn.Tensor([ 128], shape=Shape([1]), dtype=DataType::INT32, layout=Layout::ROW_MAJOR)} cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ input_tensor.dtype() == DataType::BFLOAT16 E info: E Data type of input tensor for paged_update_cache must be FLOAT32 or BFLOAT16; decode update repacks into the cache dtype and should not receive
